headline: New Dow CEO Karen S. Carter Takes Helm As Investors Assess Risks
summary: Dow (NYSE:DOW) has appointed Karen S. Carter as its new Chief Executive Officer. Carter succeeds Jim Fitterling, who will transition to the role of Executive Chair. The leadership change marks a new chapter for one of the world's largest chemical companies. Dow operates across a wide range of materials and chemicals used in packaging, infrastructure, mobility, and consumer applications, so shifts at the top can matter for many end markets. A new CEO with a strong operational background may...
